A '''freighter''' was used by [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] during a smuggling job on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. The ship was infested with deadly [[divvik]]s, and Mon, along with the [[Techrats]] and [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]] were trapped in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] came to their rescue, hitting the manual release lever for the pod.
